subcodes.first_line: O ye who gaze upon the Abhá Kingdom! For some time now, His Honour Mírzá Varqá, upon him be the Glory of God, the Most Luminous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظرین بملکوت ابهی جناب میرزا ورقاء علیه بهاء الله الابهی چندی بود که
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @law of pilgrimage, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
